forever.name: igor-inference-rate-drift
forever.description: Igor inference calls/hour vs 7-day hourly baseline. FAIL when current > 3x avg.
forever.metric_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM infra.llm_calls WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND instance_id LIKE 'igor%'
forever.baseline_sql: SELECT AVG(hourly_ct) FROM (SELECT date_trunc('hour', ts) AS h, COUNT(*) AS hourly_ct FROM infra.llm_calls WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND instance_id LIKE 'igor%' GROUP BY h) sub

forever.name: igor-memory-write-rate-drift
forever.description: Igor memory writes/hour vs 7-day hourly baseline. FAIL when current > 3x avg.
forever.metric_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clan.memories WHERE recorded_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND source_agent LIKE 'igor%'
forever.baseline_sql: SELECT AVG(hourly_ct) FROM (SELECT date_trunc('hour', recorded_at) AS h, COUNT(*) AS hourly_ct FROM clan.memories WHERE recorded_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND source_agent LIKE 'igor%' GROUP BY h) sub

_note: tool-call-error-rate check deferred: depends on T-shim-traffic-spy (shim call-log table not yet shipped)
